import unitest

pub fn single_tag_test() {
  use <- unitest.tag("slow")
  assert True
}

pub fn multiple_tags_test() {
  use <- unitest.tag("slow")
  use <- unitest.tag("db")
  assert True
}

pub fn tags_list_test() {
  use <- unitest.tags(["slow", "integration"])
  assert True
}

pub fn untagged_test() {
  assert True
}
